title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions:
Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions!
